audit_events.event: Escalation workflow initiated. 5 signals: Regulatory hold, Overdue invoice, Delayed shipment, Escalated support, Usage decline. Recovery owners notified.

customer_messages.body: Dear Northwind Strategic team, we have identified 5 active concerns requiring attention on your account. Our recovery team has been engaged and is coordinating across departments to address these matters promptly. You will receive a detailed action plan shortly. We remain committed to your success and resolving these concerns as quickly as possible.
